claude.research_note: Headless `claude -p` has WebSearch/WebFetch available, so it can do live evidence research for the grounding layer (settings.research_enabled). Extra fields here are informational only — runAgent reads just command/args/input/env_required.

codex.description: OpenAI Codex (Sign in with ChatGPT). Auth: ~/.codex.

antigravity.description: Google Antigravity CLI 'agy' (the successor to the Gemini CLI; Google account). Auth: ~/.gemini.

grok.description: xAI Grok Build (SuperGrok/X Premium+). Headless may need XAI_API_KEY.

args: printf '%s' '{"summary":"Stub test proposal (no API used).","changes":[{"day_number":1,"exercise":"Back Squat","target_weight":195,"reason":"pipeline smoke test"}],"notes":"Built-in offline stub. Use claude/codex/antigravity/grok for real coaching."}'
stub.description: Offline stub for testing the propose/apply loop with no API key.
